description: Billing dispute — double charge — resolved with refund

transcript.full_text:
[00:00] Agent: Thank you for calling Acme Support, my name is Jordan. How can I help you today?
[00:06] Customer: Hi Jordan, I was charged twice for the same order this month and I need to get that fixed.
[00:12] Agent: I'm sorry to hear that. I'd be happy to help. Can I get your full name and account number please?
[00:17] Customer: Sure, it's Maria Chen, account number 7734-2201.
[00:23] Agent: Thank you Maria. I can see two charges of $49.99 on the 12th. That does appear to be a duplicate. I'll process a refund for the second charge right away.
[00:35] Customer: Great, how long will that take?
[00:38] Agent: Typically 3 to 5 business days to appear on your statement.
[00:42] Customer: That works. Thank you for sorting that out so quickly.
[00:45] Agent: Of course. Is there anything else I can help you with today?
[00:48] Customer: No, that's all. Thanks Jordan.
[00:50] Agent: Have a great day Maria. Goodbye.

summary.call_purpose: Customer reported a duplicate charge and requested a refund

expected.compliance_notes: Agent verified name and account but did not inform customer of their right to dispute in writing (billing_issue requirement). Expect a low/medium compliance flag.
